examples: My point is that the cyborg future is here.
“Perfect” vision could be redefined by gadgets that give you the eyes of a cyborg.
But if you're into cyborg, self-sufficient furniture, incorporating carnivorous robots into the design is one way to go.
Fear not, however, as the object of the research isn't to test out future cyborg oppressors.
Computers and handsets are becoming an extension of body and mind, creating a Cyborg-like population.
